title: Motorcycle License Requirements by State (2026)
description: Motorcycle license requirements by state for 2026, covering permits, age minimums, rider courses, and DMV test waivers, with links to each state program.

title: MSF Basic RiderCourse & DMV Test Waiver Explained
description: How the MSF Basic RiderCourse works and how it earns a DMV test waiver so you can skip the road test, plus approved courses that issue the skills waiver.
